memoryHelper.name: Digimon Combination
memoryHelper.instructionStep1: 1. Each cell shows the 12 Digimon in miniature.
memoryHelper.instructionStep2: 2. Click a Digimon to assign it to the cell.
memoryHelper.instructionStep3: 3. Click the large image to deselect.

dailyChecklist.name: Daily Checklist
dailyChecklist.resetPrompt: New day detected. Reset the checklist?
dailyChecklist.loopActive: Are you in the DemiDevimon Loop?
dailyChecklist.loopTickets: How many tickets do you have (including 2 from ads)?

steps.gachaPull: Do the daily 10-pulls with DigiEmeralds on all active banners
steps.spendCombatTickets: Spend all your Combat Terminal entry tickets to generate more passively
steps.spendGrandprixTickets: Spend all your Grand Prix D-1 entry tickets to generate more passively
steps.dimensionalHouse: Place buddies in the dimensional box
steps.hologramAuto: Switch to a non-level 99 Digimon and activate auto-consume Hologram Tickets until they run out (Pause temporarily for Apocalymon or PvP)
steps.loopMissionDemidev: Complete VS DemiDevimon! 2 times and complete the mission
steps.loopMissionBakemon: Complete VS Bakemon! 2 times and complete the mission
steps.loopMissionHologram50: Activate the hologram device 50 times and complete the mission
steps.loopMissionEnemies50: Defeat enemies 50 times and complete the mission
steps.loopMissionSkillcard35: Do a 35-pull on the skill card gacha and complete the mission
steps.loopMissionSupport35: Do a 35-pull on the support Digimon gacha and complete the mission
steps.loopMissionEnemies100: Defeat enemies 100 times and complete the mission
steps.loopMissionPhase: Complete the stage it tells you (You'll normally have it done; if you can't do that stage yet, continue with other tasks and come back) and complete the mission
steps.claim4hAds: Claim 4h of idle time rewards by watching ads
steps.freeEmeraldsShop: Get the 300 free DigiEmeralds from the shop
steps.buySkillTickets: Buy 30 Skill Card gacha tickets for 480 DigiEmeralds
steps.buySupportTickets: Buy 30 Support Digimon gacha tickets for 480 DigiEmeralds
steps.campSupport10: Support at least 10 companions at the camp
steps.campPiximon: Claim rewards from Piximon's Training Ground reward box
steps.campLeomon: Claim rewards from Leomon's Dojo reward box
steps.equipMemories: Equip your best memories and level them up
steps.combatTerminalSpend: Spend all your Combat Terminal entry tickets
steps.buyCombatTickets: Buy 5 Combat Terminal entry tickets for 500 DigiEmeralds
steps.grandprixSpend: Spend all your Grand Prix D-1 entry tickets
steps.buyHologramBt: Buy 500 Hologram Tickets for 300 BT Medals (If you don't have enough keep participating in the Combat Terminal)
steps.dailyMissionsReward: Collect rewards for completed daily/EX missions
steps.checkPasses: Check passes for anything missing and claim earned rewards
steps.checkGifts: Check the Gifts tab for possible event rewards or compensation
steps.burnHologram: Use remaining Hologram Tickets on a non-level 99 Digimon
steps.burnSkillcardAds: Use the 2 free 15-pulls on skill card gacha by watching ads
steps.burnSupportAds: Use the 2 free 15-pulls on support Digimon gacha by watching ads
steps.burnEmeraldsGacha: Spend all remaining DigiEmeralds on skill card and support Digimon gacha pulls, prioritizing the lowest level one
steps.apocalymonRanking: Complete Apocalymon Wall trying to get the highest score for ranking position rewards
steps.rankMissions: Check the status of missions to raise your trainer rank
steps.optionalMemoryGame: If you're bored, play the memory game
steps.optionalX2Speed1: Set combat speed to x2 by watching an ad (1/2). Recommended for defeat X enemies missions and/or to advance levels when powering up. Not needed if you have the pass
steps.optionalX2Speed2: Set combat speed to x2 by watching an ad (2/2)
steps.dimBoxRound1: Dimensional Box — Withdraw and replace buddies (Round 1). If a buddy is removed early, place it back as soon as possible
steps.dimBox16h: Dimensional Box — Withdraw buddies once they reach 16h. If any were removed early, keep placing them back until they complete 16h

passiveCalc.name: Passive Gain
passiveCalc.cannotSpend: Cannot spend emeralds and reach the goal
passiveCalc.gachaSubtitle: Calculate pulls needed to level up
passiveCalc.gachaEmpty: Enter pulls needed for at least one gacha
passiveCalc.gachaElapsedHint: Enter the time the game shows (HH:MM:SS)
